title: Verify widget render path handles empty-string calendars
description:
Current state: Widget.getCalendarIdsAsList() returns emptyList() for calendars='' -- correct for show-no-events.

Desired state: Confirm MyWidgetListProvider and EventsHelper treat empty overrideCalendarIds as filter-to-nothing (not show-all). Trace full path. If empty override shows all events (bug), add guard. If correct, document as intentional.
